response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with two decades of full-stack work, including recent TypeScript/Node.js product development, React with MongoDB and AWS at Optilyz, and current hands-on AI-agent infrastructure work (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) that directly matches the JD's rare AI-agent requirement. A deep testing culture (TDD, authored test frameworks, taught testing courses), Docker/Kubernetes deployment experience, and a CS degree round out the profile. Gaps are narrow rather than structural: Nest.js and Vitest are not explicitly listed, recent frontend work leans Ember over React, and Kotlin/Python are absent from the skills list, though Java is present.
strengths: Current AI-agent development experience (MCP generators, agentic workflow tooling) — directly matches a hard-to-find JD requirement
Long, polyglot full-stack track record with TypeScript/Node.js, React, MongoDB/MySQL, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes
Exceptional testing and craftsmanship depth: TDD practitioner, test-framework author, and community educator
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed, both core to the primary stack
Most recent named frontend work is Ember.js; React experience dates primarily to 2014-2018
Kotlin and Python absent from stated skills despite the multi-language requirement (Java is covered)

key_factors.factor: Depth and breadth of full-stack TypeScript/Node.js experience
Missing Nest.js/Vitest and dated React exposure
